prompt: A photorealistic, high-resolution image of a glossy black Bugatti Chiron parked on a cobblestone plaza. The hypercar is positioned at a slight angle, showcasing its sleek aerodynamic curves, distinctive horseshoe front grille, quad LED headlights, black alloy wheels, and bright blue brake calipers. The car's highly reflective paint mirrors the surrounding environment. In the background stands the majestic Notre-Dame de Paris cathedral, featuring its intricate Gothic architecture, large rose window, and twin towers. The scene is set during an overcast daytime, providing soft, diffused natural lighting. A few pedestrians are casually walking in the background, and ornate vintage Parisian street lamps are visible on the right side of the plaza, adding to the European city atmosphere.
